comment: Identifier plus password, then a second factor only when the primary step reports one is required. The self-contained artifact the transcripts in this directory replay against.

steps.comment: The first factor: it emits primary_verified and whether a second factor is required.
The second factor challenge, reached only on the stepped-up path.
The session is minted with the honest amr the run earned.

transitions.comment: Step up only when a second factor is required.
No second factor required: complete straight from the primary step.
After the second factor, the unguarded edge completes the run.
